calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-12-2008 Dismissal - No Appearance

Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Responses To Interrogatories; And For Monetary Sanctions, Declaration
Off Calendar Apr-10-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Capital One's motion to compel responses to interrogatories is ordered off calendar as it was not timely noticed. CCP Section 1005, requires that motions be served and filed 16 court days prior to the hearing, with five calendar days added if the motion was served by mail. The motion was filed on March 25, 2008. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.

Ntc Of Mtn To Establish Admissions; And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-10-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Capital One's motion to deem certain matters admitted is ordered off calendar as it was not timely noticed. CCP Section 1005, requires that motions be served and filed 16 court days prior to the hearing, with five calendar days added if the motion was served by mail. The motion was filed on March 25, 2008. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-06-2008 Set For Trial On May-12-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
